name: Music
tagline: Six nights, three resident DJs, one bonfire.
cardBody: Six nights a week. Three resident DJs. Headliners on Saturdays. The bonfire is the soundtrack until midnight.
problem: Nanyuki has no permanent live-music venue and no contracted-residency programme for working DJs. Local musicians who want to make a career travel to Nairobi or Mombasa and rarely come back. The town's audience is starved of the bands, DJs, and producers that Nairobi already takes for granted. Without a stage that pays and a calendar that publishes, the local music economy stays informal and seasonal.
approach: Downtown books, pays, and programmes six nights of music a week. Three resident DJs are on contract; the calendar is published a month ahead; Saturday is the flagship night. A monthly Nanyuki-to-Nairobi exchange brings a Nairobi name up and sends a resident down, building real touring relationships rather than one-off guest spots. The bonfire pulls the audience past the bar and into the room.

programmes.name: Resident DJ programme
programmes.description: Three contracted residents cover Tuesday through Friday plus alternate Sundays. Each resident has a published night and a fee schedule. Annual renewal review.

programmes.name: Saturday flagship
programmes.description: Booked headliner if available, residents otherwise. Bonfire-led entry from sunset, lineup goes live by Thursday lunchtime.

programmes.name: Nanyuki-Nairobi DJ exchange
programmes.description: One Nairobi guest comes up per month; one Downtown resident plays a Nairobi room. Travel, fee, and overnight covered both ways.

programmes.name: Open decks
programmes.description: Tuesday afternoon slot for emerging DJs. Free entry to play, equipment supplied, the room is open to walk-in audience.

outcomes.target: 50+ programmed nights. Three resident DJ contracts in place. First four exchanges completed.
100+ programmed nights. Drum kit always set up. Open decks running weekly. Five resident DJs.
Main stage operational at 2,000 capacity. International headliner pipeline open.
First Downtown Creative Festival music edition (one week, free entry).
International artist-in-residence programme: two guests per quarter.

fundingNeeds.label: Resident DJ salaries and weekly night fees
Stage and DJ booth upgrade (mixers, monitors, lighting)
Nanyuki to Nairobi DJ exchange (travel, fees, accommodation)
Main stage build, 2,000 capacity under makuti
